reason: Undeclared dependency on node 1.1. The node opens 'Put U:=S^2-I, so ||U|| <= 4 eta', which is precisely the conclusion ||S^2-I|| <= 4 eta of node 1.1 (and the definitions S:=2Phi-I from 1.1). Node 1.2 never names node 1.1, whereas sibling nodes 1.3-1.7 explicitly cite their dependencies ('Uses node 1.2', '(nodes 1.1,1.2)'). The bound ||U|| <= 4 eta is not re-derived in 1.2, so the dependency on 1.1 must be declared for the chain to be self-contained.
